name: test_copy_message_to_clipboard
description:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

        Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
        the copied content matches the actual message text.
descriptionHtml:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

    Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
    the copied content matches the actual message text.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
  Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work with....
  Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work with....
assert "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work with. \n\nCould you please provide:\nThe message or text you want me to copy\nAny specific action you'd like me to take with it (format it, save it to a file, analyze it, etc.)\n\nI'm here to assist you efficiently once you share the content!" == "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work with. \nCould you please provide:\nThe message or text you want me to copy\nAny specific action you'd like me to take with it (format it, save it to a file, analyze it, etc.)\nI'm here to assist you efficiently once you share the content!"
  
    I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work with. 
  + 
    Could you please provide:
    The message or text you want me to copy
    Any specific action you'd like me to take with it (format it, save it to a file, analyze it, etc.)
  + 
    I'm here to assist you efficiently once you share the content!
statusTrace:
tests/ui/chat/test_chat_interface.py:220: in test_copy_message_to_clipboard
    assert _strip_markdown(clipboard_text) == ai_response_text.strip(), (
E   AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
E     Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work with....
E     Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content that you'd like me to copy or work with....
